testCode.sourceOfTruth: Stripe promotion code, created in Stripe test mode as 100% off and active
testCode.expectedCheckoutResult: completed Checkout Session with payment_status=no_payment_required and amount_total=0
testCode.expectedFulfillmentResult: verify-download returns protected PDF and DOCX download links

products.name: Letter of Explanation Kit
needs: Buyer can arrive from home Products grid, use-case rail, product page, or pricing page.
CTA should send SKU letter-of-explanation and optional discount code only.
Stripe Checkout must create a payment session using the matching test/live price ID.
For testing, enter TEST100 after creating it as an active 100% off Stripe test-mode promotion code.
After completed payment or completed 100% off session, success page must unlock protected PDF and DOCX links.
Buyer chooses either direct DOCX/PDF download or optional browser-only Studio prefill; no required pre-purchase intake.
Buyer reviews placeholders, edits truthfully, attaches real documents where appropriate, and sends materials themselves.
